title: Give me More Slab (GMS)
description: GMS is a simple and practical Minecraft mod that expands building possibilities by adding slabs for many more blocks.
body:
Give Me More Slab is a simple and practical Minecraft mod that expands building possibilities by adding slabs for many more blocks. Designed for builders who love detail and symmetry, this mod fills the gaps left by vanilla Minecraft by making additional block variants available in slab form.

Instead of being limited to only a selection of slabs, players can now craft and use slabs from a wider range of materials. This allows for smoother transitions, better structural depth, cleaner interiors, and more creative architectural designs. Whether you are building modern houses, medieval castles, underground bases, or decorative landscapes, having more slab options gives you greater control over proportions and style.

The mod stays lightweight and vanilla-friendly. It does not introduce complicated systems, machines, or new mechanics — it simply adds more slab variants to enhance creativity. All slabs function just like standard Minecraft slabs, ensuring full compatibility with survival gameplay and building mechanics.

Features:

* Adds slab variants for many additional blocks
* Improves building flexibility and design options
* Maintains vanilla behavior and balance
* Lightweight and easy to use
* Perfect for builders and creative-focused players

Give Me More Slab is all about one thing: more building freedom, with the same simple Minecraft feel.
